Patch Set 1:

Test script sanity subtest test_64f that was touched by this patch failed with 'direct io with grant allocation: grants mismatch: 8437760, expected 13381632'. This is just a heads up on first fatal failure and a full report would be posted on test completion. See the results link above if you want intermediate results.

Patch Set 1:

Oleg, I created this as sort of landing collateral for https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52595/31.

That patch has a -1 from Janitor because it innocently modifies some tests that already don't pass reliably.  This patch makes obviously harmless modifications (adding a comment) and is showing the same failures.

commit.subject: LU-13802 tests: Test Janitor testing
commit.message:
LU-13802 tests: Test Janitor testing

The patch
https://review.whamcloud.com/52595
is failing Janitor testing just because it modifies some
tests which already fail, not because of problems with the
patch or the modifications.

This patch trivially modifies the same tests to help show
this.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <patrick.farrell@oracle.com>
Change-Id: I54b64d2948723275d752109ab42de6e72016ee45
